author: claude-code-agent

patch.value: Unified extension test harness (createExtensionTestHarness): one fluent fixture binding all activate/assert/invoke/deactivate SDK helpers

Capstone for the now-complete SDK package-author testing surface. Individual helpers (activateExtensionForTest, assertRegistered*, runRegistered*, deactivateExtensionForTest) each force authors to thread the correct sub-registry (activation.registrations vs .commands vs .hooks vs .parsers vs the whole activation), which is a footgun (wrong sub-registry yields a confusing 'available: (none)' error). createExtensionTestHarness activates a module once and returns a fluent, destructurable fixture that binds every assert/run helper to the right sub-registry and exposes deactivate(), so writing a package test no longer requires knowing pm's internal registry layout. Aligns with project-management=context-management: minimizes boilerplate/token cost for agents authoring packages and makes package creation as easy and customizable as possible.

message: File capstone feature for unified SDK extension test harness under epic pm-ugqx.

author: claude-code-agent
message: Link harness capstone to the SDK testing-surface lineage (assert+invoke+deactivate helpers it unifies).

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implemented createExtensionTestHarness + ExtensionTestHarness interface in src/sdk/testing.ts (re-exported via src/sdk/index.ts and the @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk/testing subpath). The factory activates a module once and returns a fluent fixture whose 16 assert*/12 run* methods + deactivate() are pre-bound to the correct activation sub-registry; methods use closures (no `this`) so they are safe to destructure. Added 4 focused tests (sdk-index.spec.ts) covering every method via one rich fixture extension + a barrel-equivalence lock. testing.ts at 100/100/100/100 coverage (415 stmts, 287 branches, 158 fns). Docs updated: docs/SDK.md (recommended-entry paragraph + exports list + example) and docs/EXTENSIONS.md (in-place, under 450-line cap). typecheck + quality:static + quality:docs-skills green. Manual end-to-end smoke (temp dir, symlinked package, real @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk/testing import) PASSED: assert/run/hook/importer/destructure/deactivate all work against the built dist.

author: claude-code-agent

patch.value: Added createExtensionTestHarness + ExtensionTestHarness to src/sdk/testing.ts (re-exported via the sdk barrel and @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk/testing). 100% coverage (4838 tests), docstring/static/docs gates green, manual end-to-end smoke against built dist passed. Docs updated in docs/SDK.md and docs/EXTENSIONS.md.

Shipped createExtensionTestHarness: a fluent ExtensionTestHarness fixture that activates a module once and binds all 16 assert*/12 run* helpers + deactivate() to the correct activation sub-registry, so package authors never thread activation.registrations/.commands/.hooks by hand.

message: Close capstone SDK test-harness feature after full verification.
